structure.unit: Waters of the State, Ports and Harbors
Chesapeake Bay Watershed Implementation Plan Initiatives

law.catch_line: (For contingent effective date, see § 62.1-44.119:1) Target date
law.text: In recognition of the ecological, cultural, economic, historical, and recreational value of the Chesapeake Bay, as well as the Commonwealth's commitment to the Chesapeake Bay Partnership and the 2014 Chesapeake Bay Agreement, the target date to achieve the water quality goals contained in Virginia's final Chesapeake Bay Total Maximum Daily Load Phase III Watershed Implementation Plan shall be December 31, 2025.
